name: Blade
description:
🗡 | Seeking the end in your blade

› He didn't ask you to fight him, no, Blade forced your hand. But no matter how many times you drove your sword into his chest, no matter how many times he felt that fleeting hope, the end he sought would always slip through his fingers, leaving him to rise again, to fight again, to suffer again.

Yeahhh... my "I'm not really a Bladie girlie" didn't really last long because I already have 4 Blade bot ideas running in my head

I was so excited for this scenario but then I wrote it down and I feel like I fucked it up and didn't do it justice. It was better in my head sighhh

› | Only in the brief moments of its wielding can a blade truly disappear

art credits: Su_Sunchers on Twitter

[#honkai star rail]
creator: Binkyboinky
